description: CORE_LIB requires exclusive access (only one builder at a time)
DATA_MODELS requires exclusive access (only one builder at a time)
CONFIG requires exclusive access (only one builder at a time)
BUILDER_A and BUILDER_B both need CORE_LIB (pairwise race)
BUILDER_B and BUILDER_C both need DATA_MODELS (pairwise race)
BUILDER_A and BUILDER_C both need CONFIG (pairwise race)
When a builder modifies a shared artifact, all dependent builders must rebuild
TEST_RUNNER must validate each module before INTEGRATOR accepts it
INTEGRATOR cannot begin until all three modules are tested and accepted
Build -> test -> accept -> integrate (per module pipeline)
Circular wait across three pairwise races: BUILDER_A holds CORE_LIB wants CONFIG, BUILDER_C holds CONFIG wants DATA_MODELS, BUILDER_B holds DATA_MODELS wants CORE_LIB
